content: Redesigned app/(public)/finance-world/page.tsx with a distinct editorial hero, animated reveals, stronger market/news/prediction hierarchy, and page-specific background treatments. Updated components/finance-world/ai-insights-card.tsx light theme to match. Added finance-world grid/glow utilities in app/globals.css. Verification was limited by pre-existing repo issues: npm run lint triggers interactive Next ESLint setup; repo-wide and isolated TypeScript checks fail in existing files components/dashboard/daily-feed.tsx and components/ui/sheet.tsx.
